title: Caspurr's Minekitten Den
description: Modpack for the opurratives' minecraft server
body:
Modpack for Caspurr Catacini and his fanbase, the opurratives', community minecraft server.

 

Make a sprawling factory using the new Create 6.0 update and Embers: Rekindled,
hunt treasures with Alex's Caves and Better Archeology,
explore the skies in the Aether,
embrace the mental anguish that is diploid bee genetics with Forestry+Gendustry or keep it simple with Productive Bees.
Want to mess around with Botania? We got that too.
Plenty of decoration blocks are proved by MrCrayfish's Furniture Mod, Chipped, and Chisel.
Breed the best livestock you can with Genetic Animals and their simulated genetics.


Or, do none of these - nothing is required for the player to use in order to play the .

This pack was designed with "vanilla+" truly in mind. No quests, no content gates, the player is free to engage with as many or as few of these mods as they want. This was done in an attempt to avoid overwhelming players who have not used mods before, and are not used to the content they bring. Other than some new animals and blocks, you may even forget you're playing modded at times.

Learn these mods at your own pace - or, if you already know them, abuse their interactions to make some truly monstrous factories and farms.

 

This is **not** a complex pack. This was built simply under the guidance of "do these work together?" Expect redundancies, minor balancing issues, the things you'd expect from a pack you'd throw together yourself, though with a bit more care to make sure things aren't broken or redundant.
